raw.subject: Something I noticed about 209 Broadway
raw.body:
Hi,

I love that you're bringing live country music to Diagonal! Brooke Turner & The Rock'n D Boys sound like a fantastic addition to your entertainment lineup. It's great to see you're creating a fun atmosphere for locals and visitors alike.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers wondering about your hours, menu, and events. Having a simple site could help you reach more people and fill those tables during off-peak hours.

I took a look at your Facebook photos and posts and sketched out a rough idea for a homepage that highlights your local favorite status. I included a menu hero section to showcase your specials, a hours block for easy reference, a photo gallery to share your atmosphere, and a map & directions section to help folks find their way.

https://damianbasilio.github.io/f/preview/209-broadway-diagonal/

If you're interested in building out a site like this, I'd be happy to discuss a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. Would you like to reply here or schedule a quick call to chat details?
